title: Aklema elliptica
taxonomy: Aklema elliptica is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of flowering plant native to China. The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or gentian family. The family is named after the Swiss botanist Conrad Gesner. Aklema elliptica is one of the many species within this family, and more research would be needed to determine its specific classification.
